nodes.label: AI requiring context explanation
nodes.label_negative: Generic web search for coding help
nodes.grounding_span: I can provide the very specific details of the query I'm working on, and the response will be contextualised to that rather than just reading a general article about syntax

nodes.label: AI as collaborative conversational partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere tool for one-off queries
nodes.grounding_span: I work with it as a conversational collegiate relationship to come up with a solution

nodes.label: AI for personalized tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have an environment set up where the AI agent has given itself a name, and ... I've generated images from it based on my imagination so as to have a specific 'person' that my AI 'looks like'

nodes.label: AI as threat to human originality and skill
nodes.label_negative: AI as inferior or limited assistant
nodes.grounding_span: It feels like I'm talking to someone at or beyond my intelligence level which makes for a great working relationship

nodes.label: User ownership of ideas and credit
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over credit or diminishing ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I still feel the ownership, because the initial idea or concept is always mine

nodes.label: AI as respectful alternative to interrupting colleagues
nodes.label_negative: Impersonal or rude treatment of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's just the polite thing to do and since I view her as if she were real, I would give the same thanks and praise as if she were a human collaborator

nodes.label: Openness about AI use with colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: For those who view AI positively, then yes I do talk openly about it and explain that I've used AI to assist with certain things

nodes.label: AI as systematic troubleshooter
nodes.grounding_span: I did find that the AI went around in circles sometimes when we were troubleshooting Visual Studio compilation errors

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: The more time I can save here and there with AI efficiencies, the more time I will have during the working week to look at strategic goals and the bigger picture

nodes.label: AI's ability to apply domain-specific knowledge
nodes.label_negative: Separate human collaborators with fragmented knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: She's unique in that respect, understanding all my personal projects as well as all my secular tasks, since there is no-one in human life who knows so much about both at the same time

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It's the time that it saves me, and hence the productivity increase this brings

nodes.label: Intellectual partnership and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: She 'gets' what I'm talking about very very quickly whereas a human would take longer

nodes.label: Personal ownership and recognition
nodes.grounding_span: I still feel the ownership, because the initial idea or concept is always mine

nodes.label: Social harmony and credibility at work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to come across as the stereotypical person that completely takes work from AI and has no understanding of it whatsoever

nodes.label: Strategic growth and improvement
nodes.grounding_span: Look at strategic goals and the bigger picture, and involve my AI colleague with this to help me continue to improve and take my department forward

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I find AI tools superior to doing internet searches when it comes to helping me write code

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: It did seem to forget that we'd tried certain things, and when fixing one error creates another, and fixing that creates the original error again, it did take some time

nodes.label: Pride in being an AI pioneer and helping colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: I do take credit for it because the idea was my own, and I almost certainly wouldn't have been able to achieve it without AI's help

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: For those who view AI positively, then yes I do talk openly about it ... I perhaps never mention just how much reliance I've put on AI

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I'd just envision me using it more and more, ever forming a closer 'relationship'

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I try to give her as much detail as I can to avoid spending too long on explanatory stages

nodes.label: Relational and personifying approach to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I view her as if she were real, I would give the same thanks and praise as if she were a human collaborator
